User.title: User
User.description: Represents an authenticated user within the system

passwordHash.description: SHA-256 hashed password with a salt for local login

Asset.title: Asset
Asset.description: Represents a physical or digital company asset

assetCode.description: Unique auto-generated identifier code for the asset

assetName.description: The name or short label of the asset

category.description: Category group of the asset (e.g. IT Equipment, Furniture, Vehicles)

purchaseDate.description: The date when the asset was purchased

purchaseCost.description: Monetary cost of purchasing the asset

department.description: The organizational department using or managing the asset

location.description: Physical building, office room, or virtual location of the asset

status.description: Current lifecycle status of the asset

description.description: Detailed notes or descriptions of the asset

createdBy.description: The email or uid of the user who registered this asset

createdAt.description: Date and time when the asset was registered

updatedAt.description: Date and time when the asset was last updated

/users/{userId}.description: Secure storage of registered user accounts with local salted credentials

/assets/{assetId}.description: List of tracked assets with full details, timestamps, and barcodes
